TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Rukai, story: RukaiNr-frog_Waecacane
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: kay abulu kay yaie.
S.PHON: kaj abulu kaj jaiə.
S.FORM: kay abulu kay yaie.
S.PHON: kaj abulu kaj jaiə.
S.TRANSL: 這故事…
This story…

S.FORM: yakay kudra vavalake si vavalake ka sawvalay si taupunguini la kidringai kudra vaeva ku takurauru.
S.PHON: jakaj kuɖa vavalakə si vavalakə ka sawvalaj si taupuŋuini la kiɖiŋai kuɖa vaəva ku takurauru.
S.FORM: yakay kudra vavalake si vavalake ka sawvalay si taupunguini la kidringai kudra vaeva ku takurauru.
S.PHON: jakaj kuɖa vavalakə si vavalakə ka sawvalaj si taupuŋuini la kiɖiŋai kuɖa vaəva ku takurauru.
S.TRANSL: 然後要找到一隻青蛙.
then finding a frog.

W.TRANSL: 狗=第三人稱單數.附著屬格

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: sa ka maungunga yaie sa apecenga ki kuini taupungu si ki kuini vavalake.
S.PHON: sa ka mauŋuŋa jaiə sa apəʦəŋa ki kuini taupuŋu si ki kuini vavalakə.
S.FORM: sa ka maungunga yaie sa apecenga ki kuini taupungu si ki kuini vavalake.
S.PHON: sa ka mauŋuŋa jaiə sa apəʦəŋa ki kuini taupuŋu si ki kuini vavalakə.
S.TRANSL: 晚上的時候,當小狗和小孩睡著時
At night, when the dog and the kid slept

S.FORM: ki kuini takurauru la kainganay twalay ki kingidralumu kibubuli ngiabalay si katuase ubere.
S.PHON: ki kuini takurauru la kaiŋanaj twalaj ki kiŋiɖalumu kibubuli ŋiabalaj si katuasə ubərə.
S.FORM: ki kuini takurauru la kainganay twalay ki kingidralumu kibubuli ngiabalay si katuase ubere.
S.PHON: ki kuini takurauru la kaiŋanaj twalaj ki kiŋiɖalumu kibubuli ŋiabalaj si katuasə ubərə.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙從瓶子偷偷跑出來,然後慢慢地逃離.
The frog came from the bottle stealthily, and slowly ran away.

S.FORM: sa alrigilrigi ki kuini sawavalay si kuini taupunguini la dreele kadruanga kudra takurauru kudra yadringi kuini kingidralumu.
S.PHON: sa aɭigiɭigi ki kuini sawavalaj si kuini taupuŋuini la ɖəələ kaɖuaŋa kuɖa takurauru kuɖa jaɖiŋi kuini kiŋiɖalumu.
S.FORM: sa alrigilrigi ki kuini sawavalay si kuini taupunguini la dreele kadruanga kudra takurauru kudra yadringi kuini kingidralumu.
S.PHON: sa aɭigiɭigi ki kuini sawavalaj si kuini taupuŋuini la ɖəələ kaɖuaŋa kuɖa takurauru kuɖa jaɖiŋi kuini kiŋiɖalumu.

TRANSL.notes: 當男孩和他的狗醒來,(他們)看到青蛙不在瓶子裡.

S.TRANSL: 當男孩和他的狗醒來, 看到青蛙不在瓶子裡.

TRANSL.notes: When the boy and his dog woke up, (they) saw the frog is not inside the bottle.

S.TRANSL: When the boy and his dog woke up, saw the frog is not inside the bottle.

W.TRANSL: 狗=第三人稱單數.附著屬格

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: la silapenga pia kudra kuini ki daanelini nguvavaeva ki kece ki pingi ki kingidralumu ki kalilriwpane.
S.PHON: la silapəŋa pia kuɖa kuini ki daanəlini ŋuvavaəva ki kəʦə ki piŋi ki kiŋiɖalumu ki kaliɭiwpanə.
S.FORM: la silapenga pia kudra kuini ki daanelini nguvavaeva ki kece ki pingi ki kingidralumu ki kalilriwpane.
S.PHON: la silapəŋa pia kuɖa kuini ki daanəlini ŋuvavaəva ki kəʦə ki piŋi ki kiŋiɖalumu ki kaliɭiwpanə.

TRANSL.notes: 然後(他們)逐一在他們的房子裡尋找.鞋子、瓶子、角落.

S.TRANSL: 然後 逐一在他們的房子裡尋找.鞋子、瓶子、角落.

TRANSL.notes: Then (they) searched for their house one by one. The shoes, the bottle, the corner.

S.TRANSL: Then searched for their house one by one. The shoes, the bottle, the corner.

W.TRANSL: 房子=第三人稱複數.附著屬格

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱複數.附著屬格

S.FORM: la kai makakidrignai.
S.PHON: la kai makakiɖignai.
S.FORM: la kai makakidrignai.
S.PHON: la kai makakiɖignai.

TRANSL.notes: 然後(他們)找不到

S.TRANSL: 然後 找不到

TRANSL.notes: Then (they) cannot find (it).

S.TRANSL: Then cannot find .

S.FORM: la mulebe ki lribange si dawdawdaw dawdawlu ki kuini ki takurauru la kakadrua.
S.PHON: la muləbə ki ɭibaŋə si dawdawdaw dawdawlu ki kuini ki takurauru la kakaɖua.
S.FORM: la mulebe ki lribange si dawdawdaw dawdawlu ki kuini ki takurauru la kakadrua.
S.PHON: la muləbə ki ɭibaŋə si dawdawdaw dawdawlu ki kuini ki takurauru la kakaɖua.
S.TRANSL: 然後男孩去樓梯處叫喊著,想叫青蛙回來,但青蛙卻不見了.

TRANSL.notes: Then (the boy) went down to the window and yelled at the frog (but) there is no frog.

S.TRANSL: Then went down to the window and yelled at the frog there is no frog.

S.FORM: sa ilribange dawdawdaw ki kuini tadrusa yaie la kai dredreele la katuase tuverevere mucakena ki kuini taupungu.
S.PHON: sa iɭibaŋə dawdawdaw ki kuini taɖusa jaiə la kai ɖəɖəələ la katuasə tuvərəvərə muʦakəna ki kuini taupuŋu.
S.FORM: sa ilribange dawdawdaw ki kuini tadrusa yaie la kai dredreele la katuase tuverevere mucakena ki kuini taupungu.
S.PHON: sa iɭibaŋə dawdawdaw ki kuini taɖusa jaiə la kai ɖəɖəələ la katuasə tuvərəvərə muʦakəna ki kuini taupuŋu.
S.TRANSL: 當他們兩個在窗戶前喊叫時,他們沒看到任何東西.然後狗就掉到地上.

TRANSL.notes: When the two were yelling at the window, (they) didn't see anything. Then the dog fell down to the ground.

S.TRANSL: When the two were yelling at the window, didn't see anything. Then the dog fell down to the ground.

S.FORM: la kadruthili ki kuini kingidralumu kuini wamua kuini wakabungu ku aulruini si la kiangeange turamuru.
S.PHON: la kaɖuθili ki kuini kiŋiɖalumu kuini wamua kuini wakabuŋu ku auɭuini si la kiaŋəaŋə turamuru.
S.FORM: la kadruthili ki kuini kingidralumu kuini wamua kuini wakabungu ku aulruini si la kiangeange turamuru.
S.PHON: la kaɖuθili ki kuini kiŋiɖalumu kuini wamua kuini wakabuŋu ku auɭuini si la kiaŋəaŋə turamuru.

TRANSL.notes: 然後罩住狗狗的頭的瓶子就碎掉了,然後(狗狗)很痛.

S.TRANSL: 然後罩住狗狗的頭的瓶子就碎掉了,然後 很痛.

TRANSL.notes: Then the bottle that covered the (dog's) head was broken into pieces and (the dog) hurt very much.

S.TRANSL: Then the bottle that covered the head was broken into pieces and hurt very much.

W.TRANSL: 頭=第三人稱單數.附著屬格

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: ki kuini tadrusa yaie la kai makakindringai ikay latadre katuase muubuluane takudawdawdaw ku takurauru takurauru la iyaiya la kakadrua.
S.PHON: ki kuini taɖusa jaiə la kai makakinɖiŋai ikaj lataɖə katuasə muubuluanə takudawdawdaw ku takurauru takurauru la ijaija la kakaɖua.
S.FORM: ki kuini tadrusa yaie la kai makakindringai ikay latadre katuase muubuluane takudawdawdaw ku takurauru takurauru la iyaiya la kakadrua.
S.PHON: ki kuini taɖusa jaiə la kai makakinɖiŋai ikaj lataɖə katuasə muubuluanə takudawdawdaw ku takurauru takurauru la ijaija la kakaɖua.
S.TRANSL: 這兩個人啊,在外面找不到青蛙,就往草叢去,邊喊邊叫著青蛙但都找不到.

TRANSL.notes: The two cannot find (the frog) outside, (and they) went to the bush yelling and talking to the frog simultaneously (but the frog) was not here.

S.TRANSL: The two cannot find outside, went to the bush yelling and talking to the frog simultaneously was not here.

S.FORM: la arukatuase arukatuase kela ubuluane.
S.PHON: la arukatuasə arukatuasə kəla ubuluanə.
S.FORM: la arukatuase arukatuase kela ubuluane.
S.PHON: la arukatuasə arukatuasə kəla ubuluanə.

TRANSL.notes: 然後(他們)越走越靠近草叢

S.TRANSL: 然後 越走越靠近草叢

TRANSL.notes: Then (they) came closer and closer to the bush.

S.TRANSL: Then came closer and closer to the bush.

W.TRANSL: 越來越-狀態.非實現-離開
越來越-狀態.非實現-離開

S.FORM: la ngukakaynga kudra ki lalulutu kudra ki la e madu kudra ki la amakakidringaianelini.
S.PHON: la ŋukakajŋa kuɖa ki lalulutu kuɖa ki la ə madu kuɖa ki la amakakiɖiŋaianəlini.
S.FORM: la ngukakaynga kudra ki lalulutu kudra ki la e madu kudra ki la amakakidringaianelini.
S.PHON: la ŋukakajŋa kuɖa ki lalulutu kuɖa ki la ə madu kuɖa ki la amakakiɖiŋaianəlini.

TRANSL.notes: 然後他們沿著可能找得到(青蛙的)坑走.

S.TRANSL: 然後他們沿著可能找得到 坑走.

TRANSL.notes: Then (they) went along the holes where they can find (the frog).

S.TRANSL: Then went along the holes where they can find .

W.TRANSL: 名物化-可能.情態-找到-名物化=第三人稱複數.附著屬格

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱複數.附著屬格

S.FORM: la dreele ikay ki cakena kudra e barungulu nawdreele nawlili la iya kipua kikace ki kuini ki e tualay yadringi ki lepenge kuini tila.
S.PHON: la ɖəələ ikaj ki ʦakəna kuɖa ə baruŋulu nawɖəələ nawlili la ija kipua kikaʦə ki kuini ki ə tualaj jaɖiŋi ki ləpəŋə kuini tila.
S.FORM: la dreele ikay ki cakena kudra e barungulu nawdreele nawlili la iya kipua kikace ki kuini ki e tualay yadringi ki lepenge kuini tila.
S.PHON: la ɖəələ ikaj ki ʦakəna kuɖa ə baruŋulu nawɖəələ nawlili la ija kipua kikaʦə ki kuini ki ə tualaj jaɖiŋi ki ləpəŋə kuini tila.

TRANSL.notes: 然後(他們)看到地上的洞,就說他想看、想偷看,就被埋伏在裡面的老鼠咬.

S.TRANSL: 然後 看到地上的洞,就說他想看、想偷看,就被埋伏在裡面的老鼠咬.

TRANSL.notes: Then (they) saw the hole on the ground and said (he) wanted to take a look at it and to peep it," and (they) were bitten by the mouse ambushing inside.

S.TRANSL: Then saw the hole on the ground and said wanted to take a look at it and to peep it," and were bitten by the mouse ambushing inside.

S.FORM: ki kuini taupungu la mua thethengete kuini ki sigu.
S.PHON: ki kuini taupuŋu la mua θəθəŋətə kuini ki sigu.
S.FORM: ki kuini taupungu la mua thethengete kuini ki sigu.
S.PHON: ki kuini taupuŋu la mua θəθəŋətə kuini ki sigu.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗去騷擾虎頭蜂窩.

TRANSL.notes: That dog went to harass the hornet (beehive).

S.TRANSL: That dog went to harass the hornet .

S.FORM: velevelevele kuini ki angatu.
S.PHON: vələvələvələ kuini ki aŋatu.
S.FORM: velevelevele kuini ki angatu.
S.PHON: vələvələvələ kuini ki aŋatu.

TRANSL.notes: (那隻狗) 去搖那棵樹.

S.TRANSL: 去搖那棵樹.

TRANSL.notes: (That dog) was shaking the tree.

S.TRANSL: was shaking the tree.

S.FORM: ala kaynganay tuverevere kuini ki sigu mulebe si kaynganay ki kuini tumu ngipalapalapalay ikay kurikurisi iniane.
S.PHON: ala kajŋanaj tuvərəvərə kuini ki sigu muləbə si kajŋanaj ki kuini tumu ŋipalapalapalaj ikaj kurikurisi inianə.
S.FORM: ala kaynganay tuverevere kuini ki sigu mulebe si kaynganay ki kuini tumu ngipalapalapalay ikay kurikurisi iniane.
S.PHON: ala kajŋanaj tuvərəvərə kuini ki sigu muləbə si kajŋanaj ki kuini tumu ŋipalapalapalaj ikaj kurikurisi inianə.
S.TRANSL: 然後虎頭蜂掉下來,跑出來,然後他們飛出來去追那隻狗.

TRANSL.notes: Then the hornets fell down and came out. (They) came out and flew to chase it (the dog).

S.TRANSL: Then the hornets fell down and came out. came out and flew to chase it .

W.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.自由斜格

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.自由斜格

S.FORM: ki kuini vavalake kuini sawvalay la katuase ubelenge wadreele kudra barungulu kuini ki madradradraw kuini angatu si lawyakay adringi la iya.
S.PHON: ki kuini vavalakə kuini sawvalaj la katuasə ubələŋə waɖəələ kuɖa baruŋulu kuini ki maɖaɖaɖaw kuini aŋatu si lawjakaj aɖiŋi la ija.
S.FORM: ki kuini vavalake kuini sawvalay la katuase ubelenge wadreele kudra barungulu kuini ki madradradraw kuini angatu si lawyakay adringi la iya.
S.PHON: ki kuini vavalakə kuini sawvalaj la katuasə ubələŋə waɖəələ kuɖa baruŋulu kuini ki maɖaɖaɖaw kuini aŋatu si lawjakaj aɖiŋi la ija.

TRANSL.notes: 那個男孩爬上樹去看大樹洞,猜想(他)是不是在裡面.

S.TRANSL: 那個男孩爬上樹去看大樹洞,猜想 是不是在裡面.

TRANSL.notes: The boy went up to see the big tree hole and thought (the frog) may be inside.

S.TRANSL: The boy went up to see the big tree hole and thought may be inside.

S.FORM: nawmua lili la iya.
S.PHON: nawmua lili la ija.
S.FORM: nawmua lili la iya.
S.PHON: nawmua lili la ija.
S.TRANSL: 「我去偷看」他這樣想.
"I went to peep," he thought.

W.TRANSL: 第一人稱單數.附著主格=去

M.TRANSL: 第一人稱單數.附著主格

S.FORM: kaynganay ku kuici si puadukuduku ki e aulruini katuase muadreke muadreke mulebe ki angatu.
S.PHON: kajŋanaj ku kuiʦi si puadukuduku ki ə auɭuini katuasə muaɖəkə muaɖəkə muləbə ki aŋatu.
S.FORM: kaynganay ku kuici si puadukuduku ki e aulruini katuase muadreke muadreke mulebe ki angatu.
S.PHON: kajŋanaj ku kuiʦi si puadukuduku ki ə auɭuini katuasə muaɖəkə muaɖəkə muləbə ki aŋatu.

TRANSL.notes: 貓頭鷹出來啄他的頭.(男孩) 跌落樹下.

S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹出來啄他的頭. 跌落樹下.

TRANSL.notes: The owl came out and pecked his head. (The boy) fell down the tree.

S.TRANSL: The owl came out and pecked his head. fell down the tree.

W.TRANSL: 頭=第三人稱單數.附著屬格

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: ki kuini wathethethengete kuini ki sigu kuini taupungu la kikurikurisi kuini ki sigu si la katuasenga ubere.
S.PHON: ki kuini waθəθəθəŋətə kuini ki sigu kuini taupuŋu la kikurikurisi kuini ki sigu si la katuasəŋa ubərə.
S.FORM: ki kuini wathethethengete kuini ki sigu kuini taupungu la kikurikurisi kuini ki sigu si la katuasenga ubere.
S.PHON: ki kuini waθəθəθəŋətə kuini ki sigu kuini taupuŋu la kikurikurisi kuini ki sigu si la katuasəŋa ubərə.

TRANSL.notes: 那隻狗騷擾那些虎頭蜂,就被虎頭蜂追,然後(那隻狗)就逃走了.

S.TRANSL: 那隻狗騷擾那些虎頭蜂,就被虎頭蜂追,然後 就逃走了.

TRANSL.notes: The dog harassed the hornets and was chased by the hornets and then (the dog) ran away.

S.TRANSL: The dog harassed the hornets and was chased by the hornets and then ran away.

W.TRANSL: 主動-實現-重疊-重疊-騷擾
狀態.非實現-離開=完成貌

S.FORM: sa ubebere ki kuini tadrusa yaie katuatuase sa kelakela kuini ki pingapingade si.
S.PHON: sa ubəbərə ki kuini taɖusa jaiə katuatuasə sa kəlakəla kuini ki piŋapiŋadə si.
S.FORM: sa ubebere ki kuini tadrusa yaie katuatuase sa kelakela kuini ki pingapingade si.
S.PHON: sa ubəbərə ki kuini taɖusa jaiə katuatuasə sa kəlakəla kuini ki piŋapiŋadə si.
S.TRANSL: 當他們兩個逃離,他們來到懸崖邊邊
When the two ran away, they came to the edge of the cliff.

S.FORM: ala dreele kuini ricingi kuini sawavalay katuase ubelenge kuini ki e lawricingi la iya ki kuini miakaw miakaw ricingi ki angatu la katuase sa ka kuini belenge si dawdawdaw silasilape kuini takurauru.
S.PHON: ala ɖəələ kuini riʦiŋi kuini sawavalaj katuasə ubələŋə kuini ki ə lawriʦiŋi la ija ki kuini miakaw miakaw riʦiŋi ki aŋatu la katuasə sa ka kuini bələŋə si dawdawdaw silasilapə kuini takurauru.
S.FORM: ala dreele kuini ricingi kuini sawavalay katuase ubelenge kuini ki e lawricingi la iya ki kuini miakaw miakaw ricingi ki angatu la katuase sa ka kuini belenge si dawdawdaw silasilape kuini takurauru.
S.PHON: ala ɖəələ kuini riʦiŋi kuini sawavalaj katuasə ubələŋə kuini ki ə lawriʦiŋi la ija ki kuini miakaw miakaw riʦiŋi ki aŋatu la katuasə sa ka kuini bələŋə si dawdawdaw silasilapə kuini takurauru.

TRANSL.notes: 然後(男孩)看到樹枝.他爬上很像樹枝的東西然後邊喊邊尋找著青蛙.

S.TRANSL: 然後 看到樹枝.他爬上很像樹枝的東西然後邊喊邊尋找著青蛙.

TRANSL.notes: Then (the boy) saw the branch. The boy went up to something that seems to be a branch, yelled and searched for the frog.

S.TRANSL: Then saw the branch. The boy went up to something that seems to be a branch, yelled and searched for the frog.

S.FORM: la kai thingathingale alaka lawngu ki salawnguane.
S.PHON: la kai θiŋaθiŋalə alaka lawŋu ki salawŋuanə.
S.FORM: la kai thingathingale alaka lawngu ki salawnguane.
S.PHON: la kai θiŋaθiŋalə alaka lawŋu ki salawŋuanə.

TRANSL.notes: (他)不知道原來是鹿的角.

S.TRANSL: 不知道原來是鹿的角.

TRANSL.notes: (he) didn't know it turned out to be the horn of the deer.

S.TRANSL: didn't know it turned out to be the horn of the deer.

S.FORM: kuini salawnguane la katuase laylaylay ubebere kudra nawsarare amiamia ki kuini sawvalay si la kai makatumane.
S.PHON: kuini salawŋuanə la katuasə lajlajlaj ubəbərə kuɖa nawsararə amiamia ki kuini sawvalaj si la kai makatumanə.
S.FORM: kuini salawnguane la katuase laylaylay ubebere kudra nawsarare amiamia ki kuini sawvalay si la kai makatumane.
S.PHON: kuini salawŋuanə la katuasə lajlajlaj ubəbərə kuɖa nawsararə amiamia ki kuini sawvalaj si la kai makatumanə.
S.TRANSL: 那隻鹿逃走想把男孩放下來,但卻放不下來.
That deer ran away and would like put down the boy but cannot do so.

S.FORM: la katuase laylay kela kuini ki tuatukadrane sa kela tuatukadrane yaie.
S.PHON: la katuasə lajlaj kəla kuini ki tuatukaɖanə sa kəla tuatukaɖanə jaiə.
S.FORM: la katuase laylay kela kuini ki tuatukadrane sa kela tuatukadrane yaie.
S.PHON: la katuasə lajlaj kəla kuini ki tuatukaɖanə sa kəla tuatukaɖanə jaiə.

TRANSL.notes: 然後(鹿)跑到懸崖.

S.TRANSL: 然後 跑到懸崖.

TRANSL.notes: Then (the deer) ran to the cliff.

S.TRANSL: Then ran to the cliff.

S.FORM: sa pasana nguadreadreke yaie kusida kuini ki drapaleini kuini salawnguane si la katuase tuverevere mulebe ki kuini vavalake kuini sawvalay si kuini taupunguini.
S.PHON: sa pasana ŋuaɖəaɖəkə jaiə kusida kuini ki ɖapaləini kuini salawŋuanə si la katuasə tuvərəvərə muləbə ki kuini vavalakə kuini sawvalaj si kuini taupuŋuini.
S.FORM: sa pasana nguadreadreke yaie kusida kuini ki drapaleini kuini salawnguane si la katuase tuverevere mulebe ki kuini vavalake kuini sawvalay si kuini taupunguini.
S.PHON: sa pasana ŋuaɖəaɖəkə jaiə kusida kuini ki ɖapaləini kuini salawŋuanə si la katuasə tuvərəvərə muləbə ki kuini vavalakə kuini sawvalaj si kuini taupuŋuini.
S.TRANSL: 當幾乎要跌到的時候,鹿煞住他的腳,然後男孩和他的狗就掉了下去.

TRANSL.notes: When (it) almost fell over, the deer braked his feet and the boy and his dog fell down.

S.TRANSL: When almost fell over, the deer braked his feet and the boy and his dog fell down.

W.TRANSL: 腳=第三人稱單數.附著屬格

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

W.TRANSL: 狗=第三人稱單數.附著屬格

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: sa katuase tuverevere yaie la makakay kudra ki aciacilay kuini ki vaalruvaalru.
S.PHON: sa katuasə tuvərəvərə jaiə la makakaj kuɖa ki aʦiaʦilaj kuini ki vaaɭuvaaɭu.
S.FORM: sa katuase tuverevere yaie la makakay kudra ki aciacilay kuini ki vaalruvaalru.
S.PHON: sa katuasə tuvərəvərə jaiə la makakaj kuɖa ki aʦiaʦilaj kuini ki vaaɭuvaaɭu.

TRANSL.notes: 當(他們)掉下去,就馬上掉入溪流裡.

S.TRANSL: 當 掉下去,就馬上掉入溪流裡.

TRANSL.notes: When (they) fell down, (they fell) right down to the stream.

S.TRANSL: When fell down, right down to the stream.

S.FORM: la katuase ngiabalay ki kuini tadrusa.
S.PHON: la katuasə ŋiabalaj ki kuini taɖusa.
S.FORM: la katuase ngiabalay ki kuini tadrusa.
S.PHON: la katuasə ŋiabalaj ki kuini taɖusa.
S.TRANSL: 然後那兩個慢慢地離開.
Then the two left slowly.

S.FORM: la kaina e isadra kudra silasilapelini kuini ki takuraru.
S.PHON: la kaina ə isaɖa kuɖa silasilapəlini kuini ki takuraru.
S.FORM: la kaina e isadra kudra silasilapelini kuini ki takuraru.
S.PHON: la kaina ə isaɖa kuɖa silasilapəlini kuini ki takuraru.

TRANSL.notes: 然後(他們)還沒有放棄尋找青蛙.

S.TRANSL: 然後 還沒有放棄尋找青蛙.

TRANSL.notes: Then (they) have not gave up their search for the frog.

S.TRANSL: Then have not gave up their search for the frog.

W.TRANSL: 重疊-尋找=第三人稱單數.屬格

S.FORM: la dreele kudra angatu kudra cucuangalre.
S.PHON: la ɖəələ kuɖa aŋatu kuɖa ʦuʦuaŋaɭə.
S.FORM: la dreele kudra angatu kudra cucuangalre.
S.PHON: la ɖəələ kuɖa aŋatu kuɖa ʦuʦuaŋaɭə.

TRANSL.notes: 然後(他們)看到樹的枯木.

S.TRANSL: 然後 看到樹的枯木.

TRANSL.notes: Then (they) saw the dead wood of the tree.

S.TRANSL: Then saw the dead wood of the tree.

S.FORM: la kilalra miakaw yakay ku malalrialriaw la katuase ngiabalay kuini tadrusa.
S.PHON: la kilaɭa miakaw jakaj ku malaɭiaɭiaw la katuasə ŋiabalaj kuini taɖusa.
S.FORM: la kilalra miakaw yakay ku malalrialriaw la katuase ngiabalay kuini tadrusa.
S.PHON: la kilaɭa miakaw jakaj ku malaɭiaɭiaw la katuasə ŋiabalaj kuini taɖusa.

TRANSL.notes: 然後(他們)似乎聽到七嘴八舌的聲音,然後他們兩個就慢慢地過去.

S.TRANSL: 然後 似乎聽到七嘴八舌的聲音,然後他們兩個就慢慢地過去.

TRANSL.notes: Then (they) seemed to hear (someone) was talking loudly and the two left for it slowly.

S.TRANSL: Then seemed to hear was talking loudly and the two left for it slowly.

S.FORM: manemaneini kuini malalriwlriaw ani miakaw amani kudra takuraruta la iya.
S.PHON: manəmanəini kuini malaɭiwɭiaw ani miakaw amani kuɖa takuraruta la ija.
S.FORM: manemaneini kuini malalriwlriaw ani miakaw amani kudra takuraruta la iya.
S.PHON: manəmanəini kuini malaɭiwɭiaw ani miakaw amani kuɖa takuraruta la ija.

TRANSL.notes: 那個在發出聲音的是什麼?(男孩)說:「怎麼好像是我們的青蛙?」

S.TRANSL: 那個在發出聲音的是什麼? 說:「怎麼好像是我們的青蛙?」

TRANSL.notes: What are those that talk loudly? (The boy) said, "it seems to be our frog."

S.TRANSL: What are those that talk loudly? said, "it seems to be our frog."

W.TRANSL: 重疊-什麼=第三人稱單數.附著屬格

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

TRANSL.notes: 青蛙=第一人稱複數(包含).附著主格

W.TRANSL: 青蛙=第一人稱複數 .附著主格

M.TRANSL: 第一人稱複數(包含).附著主格

S.FORM: la katuase ngibuale kuini ki angatu.
S.PHON: la katuasə ŋibualə kuini ki aŋatu.
S.FORM: la katuase ngibuale kuini ki angatu.
S.PHON: la katuasə ŋibualə kuini ki aŋatu.

TRANSL.notes: 然後(他們)探頭去看.

S.TRANSL: 然後 探頭去看.

TRANSL.notes: Then (they) came out to see the tree.

S.TRANSL: Then came out to see the tree.

S.FORM: la dreele ala kidringai la kay katadruadrusa kuini sa dreele kuini ki kawrivariva malariariaw kuini ki takurauru.
S.PHON: la ɖəələ ala kiɖiŋai la kaj kataɖuaɖusa kuini sa ɖəələ kuini ki kawrivariva malariariaw kuini ki takurauru.
S.FORM: la dreele ala kidringai la kay katadruadrusa kuini sa dreele kuini ki kawrivariva malariariaw kuini ki takurauru.
S.PHON: la ɖəələ ala kiɖiŋai la kaj kataɖuaɖusa kuini sa ɖəələ kuini ki kawrivariva malariariaw kuini ki takurauru.

TRANSL.notes: 然後(他們)看見七嘴八舌的青蛙.

S.TRANSL: 然後 看見七嘴八舌的青蛙.

TRANSL.notes: Then (they) saw and found the frogs that were talking loudly.

S.TRANSL: Then saw and found the frogs that were talking loudly.

S.FORM: alaka miakaw wacekecekele kudra tathathatha.
S.PHON: alaka miakaw waʦəkəʦəkələ kuɖa taθaθaθa.
S.FORM: alaka miakaw wacekecekele kudra tathathatha.
S.PHON: alaka miakaw waʦəkəʦəkələ kuɖa taθaθaθa.
S.TRANSL: 原來一大堆就像是個大家庭

TRANSL.notes: Groups of (them) turned out to seem like a family.

S.TRANSL: Groups of turned out to seem like a family.

S.FORM: la kiragay turamuru kuini e tadrusa kuini vavalake si kuini taupungu.
S.PHON: la kiragaj turamuru kuini ə taɖusa kuini vavalakə si kuini taupuŋu.
S.FORM: la kiragay turamuru kuini e tadrusa kuini vavalake si kuini taupungu.
S.PHON: la kiragaj turamuru kuini ə taɖusa kuini vavalakə si kuini taupuŋu.

TRANSL.notes: 他們兩個(小孩和狗)非常開心.

S.TRANSL: 他們兩個 非常開心.
The two, that kid and that dog, were very happy.

S.FORM: ala sa ka pilrianenga yaie ala alra ililuku ki kuini papalralini kuini ki takurauru si katuase ubalriw.
S.PHON: ala sa ka piɭianəŋa jaiə ala aɭa ililuku ki kuini papaɭalini kuini ki takurauru si katuasə ubaɭiw.
S.FORM: ala sa ka pilrianenga yaie ala alra ililuku ki kuini papalralini kuini ki takurauru si katuase ubalriw.
S.PHON: ala sa ka piɭianəŋa jaiə ala aɭa ililuku ki kuini papaɭalini kuini ki takurauru si katuasə ubaɭiw.

TRANSL.notes: 到最後,(他們)把其中一隻青蛙的同伴拿走帶回家.

S.TRANSL: 到最後, 把其中一隻青蛙的同伴拿走帶回家.

TRANSL.notes: At the end, (they) took one of the frog's companion and bring it home.

S.TRANSL: At the end, took one of the frog's companion and bring it home.

W.TRANSL: 重疊-同伴=第三人稱複數.附著屬格

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱複數.附著屬格

S.FORM: si e kila ki kuini la takuraru yaie la adririvane sa katuatuase ki kuini e e tatulru.
S.PHON: si ə kila ki kuini la takuraru jaiə la aɖirivanə sa katuatuasə ki kuini ə ə tatuɭu.
S.FORM: si e kila ki kuini la takuraru yaie la adririvane sa katuatuase ki kuini e e tatulru.
S.PHON: si ə kila ki kuini la takuraru jaiə la aɖirivanə sa katuatuasə ki kuini ə ə tatuɭu.
S.TRANSL: 然後當他們三個離開的時候,青蛙們都很依依不捨.
Then the frogs parted with reluctance when those three left.

S.FORM: katuasenga utavananenga malrepenge kikay malrepenge kikay alubu kay.
S.PHON: katuasəŋa utavananəŋa maɭəpəŋə kikaj maɭəpəŋə kikaj alubu kaj.
S.FORM: katuasenga utavananenga malrepenge kikay malrepenge kikay alubu kay.
S.PHON: katuasəŋa utavananəŋa maɭəpəŋə kikaj maɭəpəŋə kikaj alubu kaj.

TRANSL.notes: (他們)離開並到家了.故事完整了.

S.TRANSL: 離開並到家了.故事完整了.

TRANSL.notes: (They) left and went home. The story is complete.

S.TRANSL: left and went home. The story is complete.
